title: chrysothemis rupestris
intro: Chrysothemis rupestris, also known as the Mountain Pride or Mountain Pride Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. This plant is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysothemis rupestris include the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and the alleviation of pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
